---
title: "Stratified and Clustered Randomized Experiments Assignment"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

This report documents your implementation of stratified and clustered randomized experiments. Run `python scripts/run_pipeline.py` from the project root before completing this file. The pipeline maps input to cleaned and cleaned to output, and your reported values should come from `output/results.json`.

## Fisher randomization inference

| statistic_variant | pvalue |
|---|---:|
| stratified_diff_in_means | |
| stratified_weighted | |
| clustered_unit_diff_in_means | |
| clustered_cluster_average | |

## Neyman inference

| estimator | tau_hat | se_hat | ci_lower | ci_upper |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| stratified_weighted | | | | |
| clustered_cluster_average | | | | |

## Brief interpretation

Explain why the p-values and confidence intervals differ between stratified and clustered analyses and between weighted and unweighted statistics.
